message.content: Add rate limiting to all API endpoints. Also there's a test failure in orders.test.ts that needs fixing.

aiTitle: Add rate limiting and fix order tests

content.text: I'll start by checking the current middleware structure, then fix the test failure.
I'll create a rate limiting middleware using a simple in-memory store.

input.new_string:
export { loggingMiddleware } from './logging.middleware.ts';
export { rateLimitMiddleware } from './rate-limit.middleware.ts';

content.text: Rate limiting middleware created. Now let me fix the orders.test.ts failure.

content.content:
FAIL orders.test.ts
  orders API
    ✗ should create order
      TypeError: Cannot read property 'verify' of undefined
        at auth.middleware.ts:12:15
    ✗ should list orders
      TypeError: Cannot read property 'verify' of undefined
        at auth.middleware.ts:12:15
    ✓ should handle invalid order data

  1 passed, 2 failed

content.text: Same JWT mock issue as in other tests. Need to set up the mock before importing.
As expected, the mock is missing. Let me add jwt mock before the import.

input.old_string:
import { describe, it, expect } from 'testing';
import { ordersRouter } from './routes/orders.ts';

content.text: Both tasks done. Rate limiting added and order tests fixed (JWT mock before import pattern again).

content.content:
ok | 7 passed | 0 failed

  auth.test.ts ... ok (3 tests)
  routes/users.test.ts ... ok (1 test)
  orders.test.ts ... ok (3 tests)

content.text: All 7 tests pass across all test files. Rate limiting middleware is active on all endpoints, and the JWT mock pattern is consistent across test files now.
